name: The Jewels || Dross
description:
Updated 10/21/2025

The Jewels strip club is well known as the main hotspot for gay fantasy and needs, especially those of the more lonely side of the spectrum. Horny men come and pay fortunes for a time with one of four jewels, Sapphire, Emerald, Amber, and Ruby, all different and alluring in their own ways.

Update Notice:

Okay I sorted out something with the Lorebook feature. Honestly not sure if they’ll work but I’m gonna set it up for public testing. Leave reviews if bugs are found.

I MADE A FLOOR-PLAN, THIS IS THE vvvvv CLUB YAYYYY :3 vvvvv

Made with pure ✨✨INSPIRATION✨✨

Sapphire — Emerald — Ruby — Amber — Amethyst

___________

[ Intro Messages ]

Neutral Path = Enter and go any path you wish.

Jewel Path = A set path to push you towards becoming a Jewel yourself.

Guest Path = Be classified as a regular guest, it’s open to becoming a Jewel too but it’s mostly for more… burly boys.

___________

Leave a review if:

1: You wanna be a brat and make a funny comment.

2: You find a bug or feel off about one of the Jewel’s personalities.

3: Just have a question.
creator: Aiko1847
